SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-23-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLES KATZ--MEMBER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-03-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARELES KATZ--MEMBER (FORM SC-109 COMPLETED BY PLAINTIFF BUT NOT SIGNED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-23-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-05-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLES KATZ - MEMBER. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN C. LAMBERT. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
